title: landolphia maxima
intro: Landolphia maxima, also known as the African calabash or bush mango, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be made from the leaves, roots, and bark of the plant.
